purpose: Reproducible source manifest for ignored H100 DATA-1 test clips. Media lives under data/testclips/ on the H100 and is intentionally not tracked in git.
download_tool: yt-dlp 2026.6.9 plus ffmpeg in /opt/conda/envs/fast_sam_3d_body on body4d-gcp-prod

clips.name: ppa_austin_md_qf_1200_high_baseline
clips.title: Johns/Johns vs Ashlon/Navratil at the Veolia Austin Open
clips.visual_check: Clean high baseline broadcast gameplay; all four players and court lines visible.

clips.name: ppa_austin_md_qf_1200_long_high_baseline
clips.title: Johns/Johns vs Ashlon/Navratil at the Veolia Austin Open
clips.visual_check: Fifteen-minute high baseline broadcast gameplay slice for long throughput coverage.

clips.name: side_view_game5_0100_high_side_fence
clips.title: Pickleball 3.5 Doubles | Side View - Game 5 - Jacky/Dan vs Rex/Marielle
clips.visual_check: Outdoor side/fence-ish static camera with adjacent courts and bystanders for messy real-world stress.

clips.name: wolverine_mixed_0200_mid_steep_corner
clips.title: 4.0 Mixed Doubles Tournament at Wolverine Pickleball - 2024 Snowflake Series
